creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Several package builder servers are continuously running and building packages.

There status can be accessed using this API:

> The list of all build categories can be obtained from the server using this request:
> http://{server}/data/.data.json
> 
> The list of all builds in one category on one server can be obtained using this request:
> http://{server}/data/{category-name}/.data.json
> 
> The per-package status in one build can be obtained using this request:
> http://{server}/data/{category-name}/{build-id}/.data.json

The problems that needs to be fixed:

1. There is no API call to obtain the list of builders. The actual servers are http://beefy12.nyi.freebsd.org/, http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/, etc, but there should be the official list obtainable through an API call, for example 'wget https://api.FreeBSD.org/package/build-servers.json'.

2. The whole API should be officially documented.

The objective: anyone who would like to access real time per-package build status should be able to do so using this documented API.

The action points:
1. The portmgr@ team should be maintaining the list of currently active builders in the JSON format.
2. The web service should be set up that would expose this JSON file as https://api.FreeBSD.org/package/build-servers.json (or similar).
3. The API documentation should be written and published.
